name: filter dropdown to only show allocatable rooms + render the live card
script: frappe.ui.form.on("Hostel Admission", { setup(frm) { // Only show rooms that aren't Full or under Maintenance, // and match the hostel already selected on this admission frm.set\_query("hostel\_room", function() { return { filters: { hostel: frm.doc.hostel, room\_status: "Available" } }; }); }, hostel\_room: function(frm) { if (!frm.doc.hostel\_room) { frm.set\_df\_property("room\_info\_card", "options", ""); frm.refresh\_field("room\_info\_card"); return; } frappe.db.get\_doc("Hostel Room", frm.doc.hostel\_room).then(room => { let color = room.room\_status === "Full" ? "#d9363e" : room.room\_status === "Maintenance" ? "#e8a33d" : "#2e8b57"; let card = ` **ROOM DETAILS**  ---  | Room Number | **${room.room\_number}** | | --- | --- | | Hostel | ${room.hostel || "-"} | | Block | ${room.hostel\_block || "-"} | | Floor | ${room.floor\_number ?? "-"} | | Capacity | ${room.total\_beds} | | Occupied | ${room.occupied\_beds} | | Available | ${room.available\_beds} | | Status | ${room.room\_status} |  `; frm.set\_df\_property("room\_info\_card", "options", card); frm.refresh\_field("room\_info\_card"); // auto-fetch block, floor, monthly fee from room / room type frm.set\_value("hostel\_block", room.hostel\_block); }); } });
